rows.label: qev040105_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh my, do you have business
with the Drongo Caravan-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Eh? You're looking for Lana?
Speaking of Lana, she has the same name as Nalu's
little sister who has a bit of a difficult personality-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0003
rows.name:
I got a message a little while ago
saying she was coming here, but...
Come to think of it, I haven't seen her yet-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0004
rows.name:
The Growth are roaming around this area,
so I'm worried-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0005
rows.name:
I thought she had calmed down after getting married,
but Lana has brought along a new man-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0006
rows.name:
Even though she's my sister,
her personality is quite difficult-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0007
rows.name:
Lana is expecting-mo?
Is that really true-mo...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0008
rows.name:
When things become inconvenient for her,
she does outrageous things.
She's a little sister with a bit of a difficult personality-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0009
rows.name:
I feel bad that you were dragged into my sister's selfishness-mo.
Nalu will ruthlessly extort compensation
from the deceived servant and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0010
rows.name:
...No, I mean, I will warmly comfort him,
so please don't worry-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are your eyes just painted on-mo!?
That is absolutely a stuffed animal-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040105_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even though she's my sister, she's a terrifying child-mo...
I should learn from... No, no, it's nothing-mo![ST:wait ]
